text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Recording claw machine result as a "failure."
Thank you for trying, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: No, it is fine. This was a very curious experience.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. "Cheering" from the sidelines produced a
greater link to your emotions than anticipated.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Before I knew it, I was doing things such as
holding my breath and clenching my fists.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
That is to say, I was able to experience the
exhilarating challenge of the claw machine
vicariously.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Thank you again. You gave it your best.
